answers: Crowdfunding is raising small amounts of money from a large number of people, typically through online platforms, to fund a project, product, or cause.
Crowdfunding e tumi online platform e campaign banao, target set koro, ar onek manush theke choto choto donation nao tomar project fund korar jonno.
Popular crowdfunding platforms include Kickstarter for creative projects, Indiegogo for products, GoFundMe for personal causes, and Patreon for ongoing creative work.
To succeed in crowdfunding, create a compelling video, set a realistic goal, offer attractive rewards, promote heavily on social media, and keep backers updated throughout.
